title: Anesthesia plan documentation-only review

examination.text: Supports documenting pre-procedure assessment, history, examination, risk, suitability, investigations, consent, and an individualized clinician-entered care plan.
examination.rationale: The exact DoH section supports documenting an individualized clinician-entered perioperative care plan after assessment; it does not generate or revise the plan.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports documenting pre-procedure assessment, history, examination, risk, suitability, investigations, consent, and an individualized clinician-entered care plan.

exact_section.heading: Patient assessment and individualized care plan

examination.text: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.
examination.rationale: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for Anesthesia plan documentation-only review; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

source.title: Statement on Documentation of Anesthesia Care

source_limitations: Anesthesia technique, airway, monitoring, access, blood, analgesia, nausea, postoperative location, contingency, medicine, dose, consent, and final approval remain unsupported unless clinician-entered.
Legacy duration presets, broad generic interval-history wording, and any content not explicitly mapped to an exact section remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No source mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, anesthesia plan, investigation, procedure, medication, dose, referral, discharge decision, or urgency conclusion.
UAE facility policy, credentialing, pathway, and qualified anesthesiologist review remain required before use.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
